message:
feat(Python): Implement 4 more CPython Python/ modules in Zig

Add full implementations:
- tracemalloc.zig: Memory allocation tracing with snapshots
- object_stack.zig: Object stack for bytecode evaluation
- stackrefs.zig: Tagged stack references (owned/borrowed/immortal)
- _contextvars.zig: Context variables with copy-on-write

Total: ~1975 lines of idiomatic Zig with comprehensive tests.
